name: Gooseberry Fool
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the gooseberries in a nonreactive saucepan with 1/4 cup of sugar and the water.
2. Cook very gently until the gooseberries are thoroughly done and soft enough to mash.
3. Remove from heat and pass through a sieve or food mill.
4. Add sugar to taste.
5. Fold the gooseberry puree into the whipped cream.
6. Chill for several hours.
Source: Time-Life "Good Cook" series, Fruits.
